base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stages_batch — a tile from 1991 the simpsons arcade game. 8 stages: Downtown Springfield/Krustyland/Discount Cemetery/Moe's Tavern/Springfield Butte/Dreamland/Channel 6/Nuclear Power Plant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 8 stages: Downtown Springfield/Krustyland/Discount Cemetery/Moe's Tavern/Springfield Butte/Dreamland/Channel 6/Nuclear Power Plant
